action.reasoning: Observation: Scaling the same model from 2.2M/12 epochs to 5M/20 epochs improved hidden mean_r2 from 0.4724 to 0.4949, with gains across all groups and no sign of degradation. Analysis: More diverse samples and additional optimization are helping. The main weak groups remain temperature and humidity, while scalar radiation/precipitation are already strong; a safe next step is to continue training from the best checkpoint using more/all training samples with a lower LR and higher weights on non-clamped profile outputs. Decision: Add a resume fine-tuning script that loads improved_5m20.pt, trains on a large shuffled subset/all data for 10 epochs with q/temp-focused weighted MSE, saves the best checkpoint, and submit eval.
